name: ListCaptures
description: List all captures for a specific payment. This endpoint returns a paginated list of all captures that have been created for a given payment. Each capture represents funds that have been captured from an authorized payment.

payment_id.description: The ID of the payment to list captures for. Provide the payment ID (e.g., 'tr_WDqYK6vllg') to retrieve all associated captures.

testmode.description: Enable test mode. Set to 'true' to retrieve test mode captures, or omit for live mode.
